name: reviewer-author-loop
description: Iterative reviewer-author manuscript revision workflow with verification and human-pause conditions.

interface.shortDescription: Iteratively review, revise, verify, and re-review manuscripts.
interface.longDescription: A manuscript improvement workflow where a reviewer agent critiques, an author agent revises, a verifier checks the revision, and the loop repeats until acceptance or a human-pause condition is reached. Useful for virtual peer review, rebuttal preparation, resubmission polishing, and deciding when more data, experiments, theory, or author judgment is required.
defaultPrompt: Run a reviewer-author loop on this manuscript until it is acceptable or human input is needed.
Review this paper, revise it as the author, verify the revision, and repeat.
Prepare a response-to-reviewers plan and identify any pause conditions.
